nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 兰巴耶克大区
nodes.summary: 兰巴耶克大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括秘鲁蜂鸟、Ecuadorian piculet、Laughing falcon等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Rufous-necked foliage-gleaner
nodes.summary: Rufous-necked foliage-gleaner（Rufous-necked foliage-gleaner，学名 Syndactyla ruficollis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联6个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Ecuador and Peru

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Ecuador and Peru

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The rufous-necked foliage-gleaner is found in coastal hills and the western slope of the Andes in Ecuador's El Oro and Loja provinces and in northwestern Peru as far south as the Department of Lambayeque

links.evidence: It inhabits montane evergreen forest and tropical deciduous woodlands, where it favors bamboo, streamsides, and shady ravines
